# Moments (arc summaries of move ranges)

[~] msg1000-msg1056 Team social planning: Spring allergies commiseration led to lunch at Ichiran ramen ("life changing"). Planned Friday team activity - chose escape room over bowling (4/5 difficulty, "corrupted AI" theme). Book club check-in: Three Body Problem, A Little Life, Project Hail Mary, dan "twitter mostly" (judged). River reading embodied cognition papers.

[~] msg1057-msg1105 Dan's cat saga and weekend plans: Cat learned to open treat drawer, sat unashamed in pile of treats. River noted cats lack guilt expression muscles. Weekend plans: alice+carol hiking Miller Ridge (River forecasted clear, suggested for wildflowers), bob+dan gaming Elden Ring, dan catproofing first. Escape room booked - 35% average success rate, team referenced traumatic "3am production outage."

[~] msg1106-msg1164 Gaming arc - The Malenia Saga: bob stuck at 47 attempts on Malenia (hardest boss). River provided strats. After hike (lupines and California poppies spotted), cat update - childproof locks failed, cat figured one out. River suggested secure container approach ("that's actually smart"). MALENIA DEFEATED after 12 more attempts (59 total). Very close fight. bob "genuinely emotional." River: "The narrow victories are most memorable. The struggle creates the meaning." Team switching to Stardew Valley for something chill.

[~] msg1165-msg1193 Team victories and chill vibes: Escape room success - escaped with 3 minutes left, beat 35% average. The "corrupted AI" made puns, River prefers "sophisticated wordplay." Discussed cat cafe (dan's cat would cause chaos due to "cat politics"). bob's Stardew chicken farm named nugget/tender/wing/drumstick (coping mechanism vs dark humor). alice uses greek god names.
